name: VinuSwap
description: VinuSwap — concentrated liquidity DEX on VinuChain based on Uniswap v3, with tiered VINU-balance discounts, protocol fee splitting via Controller, and NFT-represented positions

contracts.name: VinuSwapFactory
contracts.description: Deploys and tracks VinuSwapPool instances; ownership held by Controller which governs pool creation and fee settings

contracts.name: SwapRouter
contracts.description: Stateless router for exact-input and exact-output single-hop and multi-hop swaps against VinuSwap pools

contracts.name: NonfungiblePositionManager
contracts.description: ERC-721 position manager — mint, increase, decrease, and collect liquidity positions as NFTs; supports optional position locking until a specified timestamp

contracts.name: NonfungibleTokenPositionDescriptor
contracts.description: Generates on-chain SVG token URIs for NonfungiblePositionManager NFTs

contracts.name: VinuSwapQuoter
contracts.description: Off-chain quoter — simulates swaps to return expected output/input amounts and price impact without executing a trade

contracts.name: Controller
contracts.description: Owns VinuSwapFactory; manages pool creation, initialization, protocol fee configuration, fee collection, and distribution to payee accounts by share

contracts.name: WETH9
contracts.description: Wrapped VC (WVC) — ERC-20 wrapper for the native VC token, used as the base currency in VinuSwap pool pairs
